generated_oml:
instance TransportationEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Transportation environment where vehicle operates, including roads, weather, and traffic conditions"
    base:contains Vehicle, RoadSurface, WeatherConditions
]

instance Vehicle : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vehicle system under study with chassis, wheels, and powertrain"
]

instance Chassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural component of the vehicle providing support"
]

instance Wheels : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Set of wheels for vehicle mobility"
]

instance Powertrain : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Powertrain system including engine and transmission"
]

instance RoadSurface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Surface on which vehicle operates, including road type and condition"
]

instance WeatherConditions : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Atmospheric conditions affecting vehicle operation"
]

instance WheelSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring rotational speed of vehicle wheels"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WheelSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance EngineTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring engine coolant temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EngineTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance BrakePressureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring brake system pressure"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BrakePressureDataTransmitted
]

instance Accelerometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring vehicle acceleration and vibration"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AccelerometerDataTransmitted
]

instance WheelSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WheelSpeedSensor
]

instance EngineTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EngineTemperatureSensor
]

instance BrakePressureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BrakePressureSensor
]

instance AccelerometerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Accelerometer
]

instance WheelSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time wheel speed measurements from vehicle sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WheelSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimator, Optimizer
]

instance EngineTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time engine temperature measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EngineTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetector, StateEstimator
]

instance BrakePressureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time brake pressure measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BrakePressureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetector, SupervisoryController
]

instance AccelerometerData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time acceleration and vibration data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerometerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimator, FaultDetector
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric representation of vehicle physical dimensions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, Optimizer
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model using differential equations for vehicle system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimator, Optimizer, PredictiveSimulationAlgorithm
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model for cyber-physical system aspects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetector, StateEstimator
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting faults in vehicle systems using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm estimating vehicle state variables from sensor measurements"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm optimizing operational parameters for efficiency and safety"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm updating model parameters using sensor data for calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance PredictiveSimulationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for simulating future behavior of vehicle under various conditions"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for automated adjustments based on supervisory control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of system safety and performance using sensor data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyInsight, PerformanceInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection via specialized algorithms for system health monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of operational parameters using optimizers for efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalParametersInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control for automated adjustments to physical twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulations forecasting physical twin behavior under varying conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides FutureBehaviorInsight
]

instance SafetyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of system safety status based on real-time data"
]

instance PerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Evaluation of system performance metrics for optimization"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of anomalies or faults in vehicle components"
]

instance OptimalParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommended operational parameters for optimal efficiency"
]

instance FutureBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted vehicle behavior under different operational scenarios"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of vehicle systems based on control signals"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recommendation for maintenance actions based on fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
